title: kickxia elegans subsp. dichondrifolia
intro: Kickxia elegans subsp. dichondrifolia, also known as Dichondra, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Convolvulaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is known to offer health benefits such as relieving urinary tract issues, reducing fever, and alleviating joint pain due to its anti-inflammatory properties. Traditional herbal preparations include making teas, infusions, and tinctures from the leaves and roots of the plant to harness its medicinal benefits.
